text.title: Ruby ActiveRecord Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for cleaning up an ActiveRecord model.

step.name: extract-scopes
step.action: For each WHERE used ≥2x, add a `scope :name, -> { ... }` to the model. Rewrite call sites to use the scope.

step.name: fix-n-plus-one
step.action: For each N+1 site, add `.includes(:assoc)` or `.preload(:assoc)` at the query origin.

step.name: add-enum-for-status
step.action: Migration renames column if needed (integer column); model declares enum. Update call sites to predicate methods.

step.name: wrap-multi-write-tx
step.decision-gate: If `update_all` still in business code, STOP and replace with explicit update on individual records.

step.name: lint-time-now
step.action: Enable rubocop-rails Rails/TimeZone cop; replace all Time.now / Date.today.
